overview: A full-stack GTO poker training platform on the Internet Computer — an analog of GTO Wizard. Train against pre-solved spots, explore the solved library with range matrix heatmaps, use the spot solver, and review your hand history — all with data stored on-chain using Internet Identity authentication.
features: Internet Identity login with guest mode
Library of 15+ pre-solved spots with 13x13 range matrix heatmaps
Trainer module with instant GTO feedback and EV indicators
Spot Solver with 4-color board card picker
Hand History Analyzer with sample data
Dashboard with user stats and progress charts
Dark poker theme with 4-color deck and animated table
